title: Will it be confirmed that Graham Platner is the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate in Maine on July 31, 2026?

current.lean_note: no +EV value bet at the ask (my prob 0%, modal NO) — staying out.
current.rationale_summary: Multiple credible sources from July 14-17, 2026, confirm that Graham Platner has withdrawn from the Senate nomination, with Maine Democrats actively seeking a replacement. While the exact timeline of his withdrawal is unclear, the consensus across multiple reputable outlets indicates that he is no longer the nominee.
